name: the_ring
description: Minimalist meditative arcade. Pixi.js 1.6 game from 2014, revived for the web in 2026.

scripts.prestart:prod: npm run build:prod && rm -rf _site && mkdir -p _site && cp min.html _site/index.html && cp -r out font lib js sounds _site/ && cp sprite_en.png spriteSheet_en.json 192.png 512.png favicon.png manifest.webmanifest sw.js _site/ && (cp preview.png _site/ 2>/dev/null || true)

author: Roman Pekarsky <contact@rpekarsky.com>
